name: 1'8"x5" Low Profile Kitchen Runner Oatmeal Striped - Room Essentials™
description:
Refresh your space with modern style with this Low-Profile Kitchen Runner from Room Essentials™. This rectangular kitchen runner features an allover oatmeal striped pattern for a stylish look that blends well with any decor. The polyurethane material provides soft underfoot comfort, while a flat pile height makes it suitable for high-traffic areas within your home.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
